query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pdi_validacoes` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `pdiId` int NOT NULL,
  `liderId` int NOT NULL,
  `aprovadoEm` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `justificativa` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`pdiId`) REFERENCES `pdis` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (`liderId`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

  `justificativa` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`pdiId`) REFERENCES `pdis` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
